items.title: 'Passive' and 'crumbled' - did Tuchel's defensive tactics cost England?
items.summary: England went 1-0 up against Argentina before slumping to a heartbreaking semi-final defeat. Did boss Thomas Tuchel's "negative" tactics cost them a place in the World Cup final?

items.title: England fans convinced Argentina winner should have been DISALLOWED after ‘VAR ignored Messi stomp’
items.summary: ENGLAND fans are convinced that Argentina's winning goal in the World Cup semi-final should have been disallowed for a foul on Djed Spence. items.title: How hard is it for Littler to go back to back at the World Matchplay?
items.summary: The World Matchplay was a tournament dominated by Phil Taylor as - from 1994 to 2014 - he picked up 15 wins in Blackpool out of a possible 21. Yes, you read that correctly.

items.title: Kane unsure if he will play at next World Cup
items.summary: Harry Kane says it is "too early" to judge whether he could play on for England until the 2030 World Cup following the painful semi-final defeat by Argentina.

items.title: I played under Southgate and I can’t see much difference with Tuchel – he was supposed to get England over the line
items.summary: THOMAS TUCHEL was brought in as England manager to get us over the line. But, as someone who played under Gareth Southgate, I don't see much difference from when he was in charge to what we've done at this World Cup. Gareth got us to a semi-final, and two European Championship finals.  Perhaps
